usa-beef-packing-roswell-nm.about: The only USDA-certified meatpacking plant in New Mexico. Processes approximately 60 head of cattle per day, offering custom processing, halal slaughter, cattle and bison programs. Second-generation processor with 28 years of experience.

villmann-butcher-block-llc-tomah-wi.about: Whole-animal butcher shop in Tomah, WI, specializing in beef, pork, and venison processing.

wall-meat-processing-plant-wall-sd.about: Custom meat processing plant built nearly 60 years ago, less than a mile from Wall Drug in Wall, SD. First South Dakota meat processing plant approved for interstate commerce. Expanding with a planned $21 million facility.

wanamingo-meats-wanamingo-mn.about: Explore Blondies Butcher Shop in Wanamingo, a legendary meat market location known for premium cuts & expert butchery. Experience quality & tradition.

weimer-meats-bradenville-pa.about: Custom and USDA-inspected meat processing facility in Bradenville, PA, with a retail location in New Alexandria, PA.

wells-jenkins-wells-forest-city-nc.about: Full-service USDA-inspected abattoir in Forest City, NC, contracting with over 1,040 independently owned farms for processing from hoof to freezer. Recently expanded with acquisition of an 18,768 sq ft facility.

wenneman-meat-co-saint-libory-il.about: Full-service, federally inspected old-fashioned butcher shop, slaughterhouse, processing facility, and smokehouse operating since 1927 — three generations. Produces over 10,000 pounds of hickory-smoked bacon per week.

whalens-meat-packing-llc-belgrade-mt.about: USDA-inspected processing plant in Belgrade, MT. The only USDA-inspected facility in Montana approved for dry-aging meat. Known for quality meats, smoked sausage, and jerky.

your-choice-meats-llc-wiggins-co.about: Family-owned custom processing and retail meat sales company in Wiggins, CO, specializing in processing from live animal to freezer at customer specifications. Established 2008.

zds-meatz-oakley-ks.about: Specialty meat shop in Oakley, KS (est. 2018) offering custom meat processing, retail cuts, deli meats, seafood, cheeses, spices, and rubs. Slaughter every Wednesday by appointment.

zk-ranches-springfield-tn.about: A sixth-generation cow/calf cattle ranch located in the heart of Middle Tennessee; Zach & Lyndi have a vision of offering a superior-quality products directly to consumers.
